settings.title: 60-Day Money-Back Guarantee
settings.text: If the course is not the right fit for you and your dog, we will refund your purchase. No hassles, no questions asked.

settings.question: Is it possible to train a dog through a digital course?
settings.answer: Yes. The course is built to break the process into clear, practical lessons you can apply step by step in real life.

settings.question: I am short on time, how long will it take?
settings.answer: The lessons are designed to be easy to follow and can be implemented in short training windows throughout the week.

settings.question: Will it work for my adopted dog?
settings.answer: Yes. The course is framed for dogs of different ages, backgrounds, breeds, and temperaments, including adopted dogs.
